Related Entities

  • hospital NORTH OAKS MEDICAL CENTER 2-star overall rating
  • hospital CYPRESS POINTE SURGICAL HOSPITAL
  • hospital HOOD MEMORIAL HOSPITAL
  • hospital LALLIE KEMP MEDICAL CENTER
  • hospital OCEANS BEHAVIORAL HOSPITAL OF KENTWOOD
  • hospital UNIVERSAL BEHAVIORAL HEALTH HOSPITAL
  • snf The Lodge at Tangi Pines 2-star, 100 beds
  • snf LANDMARK NURSING CENTER HAMMOND 2-star, 150 beds
  • snf Belle Maison Nursing & Rehabilitation Center, LLC 3-star, 140 beds
  • snf Heritage Healthcare of Hammond 1-star, 108 beds
  • snf PONCHATOULA COMMUNITY CARE CENTER 5-star, 140 beds
  • snf HAMMOND NURSING HOME 4-star, 120 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
